text.title: Django Testing with pytest Core Rules
text.summary: 7 testable rules grounding the testing-django-pytest methodology. Each pairs a binary check + sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Tests MUST use pytest function style (def test_*) with @pytest.mark.django_db. unittest.TestCase subclasses are forbidden in new code.
rule.rationale: Function style composes with pytest fixtures without super() calls and reads more cleanly.

rule.statement: Object graphs MUST be built via factory_boy factories defined in conftest.py. Raw Model.objects.create() inside test bodies or conftest fixtures is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Factories evolve with the model; raw creates accumulate required-field calls that break silently when new non-nullable fields are added.

rule.statement: Duplicate tests that differ only in inputs/outputs MUST be collapsed into @pytest.mark.parametrize. Sequence-numbered names (test_create_1, test_create_2) are forbidden.
rule.rationale: Parametrize keeps the assertion concept singular and the variants readable; sequence names destroy interpretability.

rule.statement: Mock(spec=...) cascading is forbidden. Mocks MUST cover only direct collaborators of the SUT; deeper graphs go through thin integration tests with a real DB.
rule.rationale: Deep mocks freeze refactors and make green tests lie when collaborators change.

rule.statement: The SUT MUST be invoked once and the result captured before assertion. assert service.do() == service.do() is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Double invocation doubles side-effects and hides flakes; capture-then-assert keeps state observable.

rule.statement: Critical modules MUST be covered by mutation testing (mutmut/cosmic-ray) — not just line coverage. assert True is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Line coverage is satisfied by meaningless assertions; mutation score forces tests to actually catch behaviour changes.

rule.statement: When a test fails, the LLM MUST surface the failing diff for human review before editing production code. Silent production edits to make tests pass are forbidden.
rule.rationale: TDD failure mode for LLMs is to fix the symptom (failing test) by changing production code, hiding the real bug. Human checkpoint catches this.
